meta.title: 益生菌健康产品微信朋友圈视觉 mood board
meta.summary: 面向40-50岁女性的朋友圈 campaign 视觉方向，围绕益生菌、产品包装盒、温和健康感、可信赖但不医疗化的生活场景。

businessContext.product: 元气启航乐源胶原蛋白固体饮料，益生菌/健康产品方向

nextOutputs: 朋友圈九宫格素材方向

signals.audienceCue: 成熟、理性、关注健康管理和日常状态的40-50岁女性
signals.emotionalRegister: 温和、可信、清爽、有生活质感，不夸张、不医疗化
mustInclude: 产品包装盒或抽象包装盒
益生菌/肠道健康的轻科学感
适合微信朋友圈的真实生活感
avoid: 医院、医生、药品疗效暗示
可读文字、真实logo复刻、硬广排版

items.title: 清晨厨房产品静物
items.caption: 白绿包装盒放在干净厨房台面，旁边有温水杯、燕麦和植物。
items.source: 产品包装图与微信朋友圈健康生活场景
items.motif: 包装盒、早餐、温水、自然光
items.prompt: Single editorial product photograph for a probiotic wellness campaign aimed at women age 40 to 50 in WeChat Moments. A generic white and fresh green supplement packaging box inspired by a probiotic product box sits on a clean morning kitchen counter, with a glass of warm water, oats, and a small green plant. Soft natural morning light, calm mature lifestyle, trustworthy health feeling, white green and gentle gold palette. No readable text, no real logo, no medical claims, no hospital cues, no collage, no grid. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

items.caption: 40-50岁女性在窗边拿着温水杯，包装盒在桌面边缘出现。
items.source: 目标人群与朋友圈日常场景
items.prompt: Single lifestyle photograph for a probiotic wellness product campaign, showing an elegant Chinese woman in her 40s or early 50s sitting by a bright window with a warm water glass in hand. A generic white green supplement box is softly visible on the table, not dominant but recognizable as packaging. Calm self-care ritual, mature confidence, natural skin texture, soft daylight, clean white green and warm gold palette. No readable text, no real logo, no medical claim, no hospital, no doctor, no collage. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

items.title: 轻科学益生菌静物
items.caption: 用玻璃器皿、乳白粉末、绿色植物表达轻科学，不像医疗实验室。
items.source: 益生菌和轻科学视觉暗示
items.prompt: Single visual reference image, a soft wellness science still life for a probiotic product campaign. A generic white green supplement box beside glass vessels, a spoon with fine white powder, tiny natural botanical elements, and a subtle abstract probiotic microbe motif as physical decorative beads, not medical. Clean studio daylight, trustworthy, fresh, gentle gold accent, premium but approachable. No readable text, no logo, no lab coat, no hospital, no medical claim, no collage or layout. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

items.title: 成熟女性与家庭关怀
items.caption: 家庭餐桌前的健康关怀感，强调陪伴而不是治疗。
items.motif: 家庭餐桌、女性、温水、包装盒
items.prompt: Single warm lifestyle photograph for a probiotic wellness campaign. A mature woman around 45 to 50 prepares a simple healthy breakfast at a family dining table, with a generic white green supplement box nearby and a glass of water. The feeling is care, balance, and everyday wellness, not treatment. Natural Chinese home setting, soft beige, white, green and muted gold palette. No readable text, no real brand mark, no medical claims, no doctor, no hospital, no collage. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.
